title: justicia mariae
intro: Justicia mariae, also known as the Justicia plant or the "Queen's Wreath", is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia mariae include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional folk remedies in various parts of the world.
